author: doll-agent
content: Existing FromArrow<T> impl in arrow_conv covers all primitive types ferray supports (u8..u64, i8..i64, f32, f64). Added DynArray dispatch (record_batch_to_columns) which is the higher-level FromArrow form for batch-typed input. Per-element-typed FromArrow impls for Float16Array (gated on f16) and the missing-NpElement integer widths require the same DynArray widening tracked in #644 to be useful. Tracks #555.
